nasb.text: In the third year of Asa king of Judah, Baasha the son of Ahijah became king over all Israel at Tirzah, and reigned twenty-four years.

esv.text: In the third year of Asa king of Judah, Baasha the son of Ahijah began to reign over all Israel at Tirzah, and he reigned twenty-four years.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞撒第三年，亞希雅的兒子巴沙在得撒登基作以色列的王，共二十四年。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚撒执政第三年，亚希雅的儿子巴沙在得撒登基做以色列王，执政二十四年。
